sections.paragraph:
f. (from the root יָלַד).-

(1) birth, origin. Est 2:10, 20 plur. מֹולְדֹות nativity, origin, Eze 16:3, Eze 16:4 אֶרֶץ מֹולֶדֶת Gen 11:28 24:7 and simply מֹולֶדֶת native land, Gen 12:1 24:4 .

(2) progeny, offspring, children, Gen 48:6 Lev 18:9, 11 Lev 18:11.

(3) kindred, family, Gen 31:3 those of the same nation, Est 8:6.
